name: ARROW ELECTRONICS, INC.
business: Arrow Electronics sources and engineers technology for manufacturers, service providers, and users of enterprise computing solutions, distributing electronic components through its global components segment and enterprise computing solutions through its global ECS segment.
sellsTo: industrial sectors (industrial, automotive, transportation, computing, networking, communications)

exposures.sentence: Within the global components segment for 2025, sales of approximately 72% consist of semiconductor products and related services;

The company’s portfolio is designed to enable technology across major industries and markets including industrial automation, edge and cloud computing, smart and connected devices, and transportation to deliver new technologies.

ArrowSphere, a software and cloud marketplace and management platform.
Within the global ECS segment for 2025, sales of approximately 15% consist of security
Within the global ECS segment for 2025, sales of approximately 5% consist of networking

increase in sales in the Americas region primarily due to higher demand for the integrated services offerings, partially offset by a decrease in demand for defense, transportation, and automative verticals;

Supply chain service offerings include procurement, logistics, warehousing, financial management, and insights from data analytics.
The company anticipates that demand for components will continue to gradually increase aided by the market focus on AI technology.
ArrowSphere includes an AI-enabled digital go-to-market platform aimed at helping the company’s channel partners sell and support a variety of cloud offerings at higher rates.
Global ECS portfolio includes datacenter, cloud, security, and analytics solutions.
Within the global components segment for 2025, sales of approximately 16% consist of IP&E products, such as capacitors, resistors, potentiometers, power supplies, relays, switches, and connectors;
Within the global components segment for 2025, sales of approximately 7% consist of computing and memory;
Within the global ECS segment for 2025, sales of approximately 27% consist of software applications
Within the global ECS segment for 2025, sales of approximately 25% consist of storage
